data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'effective windows and revocation/suspension lifecycle', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding these aspects. The linked use case mentions the need for this lifecycle, yet there is no direct evidence demonstrating that it has been implemented or validated. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of effective windows and revocation/suspension lifecycle.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for effective windows and revocation/suspension lifecycle
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete checks that validate the lifecycle of effective windows and revocation/suspension.
